nasb.text: For as the woman originates from the man, so also the man has his birth through the woman; and all things originate from God.

esv.text: for as woman was made from man, so man is now born of woman. And all things are from God.

cnv.text: 因為正如女人是由男人而出，照樣，男人是藉著女人而生；萬有都是出於　神。

ccb.text: 因为女人是从男人而来，男人又是女人生的，但万物都是来自上帝。

csbs.text: 因为就像女人出于男人，照样，男人也来自女人，而一切都是出于神。
